LANDING.DESCRIPTION: From languages to logic. I am a Translator and Interpreter turned Web Developer, fusing linguistic precision with digital architecture.

ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: My time at the University of Münster and my academic background in Córdoba have shaped a global mindset, strong adaptability, and a meticulous approach to solving complex challenges in teams. I build bridges — between languages, and between users and technology.

MUNSTER.TEXT: Academic experience at the University of Münster, where I developed an international perspective and strengthened my ability to work in multicultural environments.

CORDOBA.TEXT: University studies in Córdoba, building a solid foundation in analysis, communication, and structured thinking.

NOW.TEXT: Designing and developing digital solutions with a human-centered approach, connecting technology, design, and user experience.
